'''Wynth''' was an astronomical object<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Wynth system/Legends|Wynth system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Wyloff sector/Legends|Wyloff sector]]<ref name="CRO" /> in the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA" /> Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[operative]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] defector [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]] was stationed at Wynth.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wynth was created by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Wynth [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body Wynth, in grid square L-8.<ref name="TEA" />
